RendezvousPoint.title: RendezvousPoint
RendezvousPoint.description: A claimable endpoint that can store static or dynamic JSON data and handle custom redirects.

state.description: The current claim state of this rendezvous point

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the rendezvous point was created

ownerUid.description: The UID of the user who claimed this point

ownerEmailHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the owner's email address

managementHandle.description: A secure random identifier used to manage this point without revealing its public ID directly

managementIndex.description: Counter incremented whenever management URL is rotated

claimedAt.description: Timestamp when the rendezvous point was claimed

ttlDeleteAt.description: Optional TTL deletion timestamp for unclaimed points

publicJson.description: Optional arbitrary JSON content exposed at the public URL of the point

SystemAdmins.title: SystemAdmins
SystemAdmins.description: Document holding the system administrator configuration.

uids.description: List of system administrator user UIDs

/system/admins.description: Stores system configuration, specifically lists of administrator UIDs
